+package targets
+
+import (
+	"k8s.io/gengo/v2/types"
+)
+
+// Index maps APIVersion strings ("apps/v1") to the Go paths where the versioned
+// API are defined.
+type Index map[string]string
+
+// NewIndex builds an Index from a universe.
+func NewIndex(universe types.Universe) (Index, error) {
+	idx := Index{}
+	for _, pkg := range universe {
+		if pkg == nil || pkg.Dir == "" {
+			continue
+		}
+		av, err := LoadAPIVersion(pkg.Dir)
+		if err != nil {
+			return nil, err
+		}
+		if av == nil {
+			continue
+		}
+		idx[av.Metadata.Name] = pkg.Path
+	}
+	return idx, nil
+}
+
+// ResolveVersionedPackage returns the Go import path of versioned API that corresponds
+// to the given version of an internal version.
+func (i Index) ResolveVersionedPackage(iv *InternalVersion, version string) string {

@@ -0,0 +1,126 @@
+/*
+Copyright The Kubernetes Authors.
+
+Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
+you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
+You may obtain a copy of the License at
+
+    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
+
+Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
+distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
+WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
+See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
+limitations under the License.
+*/
+
+package targets
+
+// Metadata is the kubernetes-style metadata block used by codegen manifests.
+type Metadata struct {
+	Name string `yaml:"name"`
+}
+
+// APIVersion declares an external versioned API package, such as
+// staging/src/k8s.io/api/<group>/<version>/. Each entry corresponds to one
+// served GroupVersion.
+type APIVersion struct {
+	APIVersion string         `yaml:"apiVersion"`
+	Kind       string         `yaml:"kind"`
+	Metadata   Metadata       `yaml:"metadata"`
+	Spec       APIVersionSpec `yaml:"spec"`
+}
+
+// APIVersionSpec carries codegen-relevant fields for an APIVersion.
+type APIVersionSpec struct {
+	// ModelPackage is the OpenAPI model package name for this group/version
+	// (e.g. "io.k8s.api.apps.v1").
+	ModelPackage string `yaml:"modelPackage,omitempty"`
+}
+
+// Group returns the API group part of metadata.name.
+func (av *APIVersion) Group() string {
+	g, _, _ := splitGroupVersion(av.Metadata.Name)
+	return g
+}
+
+// Version returns the API version part of metadata.name.
+func (av *APIVersion) Version() string {
+	_, v, _ := splitGroupVersion(av.Metadata.Name)
+	return v
+}
+
+// InternalVersion declares an internal API package, typically pkg/apis/<group>/.
+// Holds canonical Go types for one API group; versioned adapters at
+// <group>/<version>/ are auto-discovered as subdirectories.
+type InternalVersion struct {
+	APIVersion string              `yaml:"apiVersion"`
+	Kind       string              `yaml:"kind"`
+	Metadata   Metadata            `yaml:"metadata"`
+	Spec       InternalVersionSpec `yaml:"spec,omitempty"`
+}
+
+// InternalVersionSpec carries optional codegen overrides for adapters.
+type InternalVersionSpec struct {
+	// VersionPackages overrides per-version resolution for adapter directories
+	// whose layout doesn't follow standard conventions.
+	VersionPackages []VersionPackage `yaml:"versionPackages,omitempty"`
+}
+
+// VersionPackage carries per-version overrides for a versioned adapter.
+type VersionPackage struct {
+	// Name is the adapter directory's basename (e.g. "v1alpha1").
+	Name string `yaml:"name"`

+# discovery universe for codegens whose generators self-filter via
